title: Mediterranean Focaccia
description: A delicious flatbread recipe inspired by the flavors of the Mediterranean. This recipe features a crispy crust, a soft interior, and a flavorful topping.
instructions: 1. In a large bowl, combine the yeast and warm water. Stir to dissolve the yeast.
2. Add the olive oil, salt, and rosemary to the bowl. Mix until well combined.
3. Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
4. Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with plastic wrap, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
6. Punch down the dough and shape it into a circle or an oval.
7. Place the dough on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
8. Dimple the dough with your fingers and drizzle with olive oil.
9. Bake the focaccia for 15-20 minutes until it's golden brown.
10. Remove the focaccia from the oven and sprinkle with parmesan cheese and garlic.
11. Drizzle with olive oil and sprinkle with sea salt.
